The following events took place in approximately '''23,900 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Tionese War]] ends with the defeat of the [[Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion]] by the Hutt Empire and the Galactic Republic.<ref name="Warfare" />
*Remnants of the Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion join the Galactic Republic.

==Behind the scenes==
The fourth entry in the [[Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|''Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare: Author's Cut'']] series of blog posts erroneously says that the Tionese War ended in 24,000 BBY instead of 23,900 BBY.<ref name="Blog">{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-4-the-rise-of-the-republic-needs-author-entry|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 4: The Rise of the Republic}}</ref>
